name: Frozen Chocolate Banana
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Banana; peeled and cut in half crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap banana halves in wax paper or foil and freeze until hard.
2. On a sheet of wax paper, spread half the cracker crumbs.
3. Coat one banana half with 1/2 tsp chocolate syrup, then roll in crumbs.
4. Repeat the procedure with the remaining banana half.
5. Serve immediately or wrap in moisture- and vapor-resistant wrapping and store in freezer until ready to use.
Makes 2 servings, each serving is 1/2 Banana (B), 1 Frozen (Fr) and contains 10 optional calories.
